title: Filbert
bodyText:
Orphan halfling turned **F & B Company** mogul — "semi-rich savvy businesschild," posters of himself and [[pc-brolin|Brolin]] all over [[koviz]] ("[[gond]]'s Gift to Koviz"), delivery carts everywhere, a young disciple (**Rebekkaah**), a gold hoard and motivational posters at home (B&E'd by [[pc-felson|Felson]] + [[cumb]], S23). Performs Gond piety; **shady as f***; picked **Mr. Spells** as his one board seat. The board now: Filbert + Brolin (ops), Eddy/Varen/Felson, Mr. Spells. Portrait: art/filbert.jpg
